warnings: Dense 4-column x 11-row legend table with small glyph-based symbols (valve types, cleanout variants, fitting marks). Symbol Thai-text meanings are read with high confidence; the exact graphic glyph for each symbol (left column) is a description aid, not a precise transcribed vector shape.

Read directly from this page's own image; content (44 symbol/meaning pairs) matches house #1's page26 and house #2's page36 symbol legend verbatim -- all three houses use the same standard sanitary symbol-legend table.

A few adjacent rows for FD./FCO./AVC. are near-duplicate variants distinguished only by a small graphic difference (e.g. side-outlet vs standard) that is hard to distinguish confidently at this resolution -- flagged for human zoom-review of the glyph column only, not the meaning text.
Field-set for pattern 'symbol' is still draft per schema doc section 1 -- kept the same field shape used for house #1/#2's equivalent page (symbol_entries[]).
